rows.label: xs33200140_MSG0010
rows.name:
This data also seems to be information
regarding this device, but[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200140_MSG0030
rows.name:
The majority of the data is corrupted,
and none of it makes sense.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200140_MSG0040
rows.name: Did we draw a blank, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200140_MSG0050
rows.name:
Tatsu is disappointed after
we finally found it, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200140_MSG0060
rows.name: The only part I can barely read is[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200140_MSG0070
rows.name:
"The fetters unleashed from the shell" "Shall
become the yoke that executes the soul."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200140_MSG0090
rows.name:
Based on the information we have so far, the
"fetters" likely refers to this device.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200140_MSG0100
rows.name:
When those "fetters" are
unleashed, they become a "yoke"[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200140_MSG0110
rows.name:
If you read it literally, it
can be taken that way, but[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200140_MSG0120
rows.name:
Mo-mo-mo[ST:wide ]— Tatsu doesn't
understand at all, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200140_MSG0130
rows.name:
I'll leave the difficult
thinking to Lin-san, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33200140_MSG0160
rows.name:
What these words mean[ST:wide ]— the time
might come when we understand.[ST:wait ]
